title: Sinhala transliteration
body:
**Problem:** `indic_transliteration_dart` has a very convenient automatic “script to Roman” workflow, but it does not support Sinhala, so Sinhala input cannot be transliterated within the same pipeline. 

**Proposed solution:** add Sinhala support by detecting the Sinhala Unicode block (U+0D80–U+0DFF) and routing Sinhala text through the `inditrans` package for Sinhala→Roman transliteration, using the same Roman output scheme already used elsewhere, so Sinhala becomes a seamless fallback while preserving the current “unknown script → Roman” behavior.
